payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden barstool with a black padded seat cushion, turned legs and a circular footrest; ornate carved back is partially visible and the wood has a glossy finish — estimated distance ~1.0 m from the camera.
